rationale.R1.1: The agent restated some concepts but didn't identify deeper issues or propose significant reframing.
rationale.R1.2: Addressed localized consistency issues without end-to-end analysis.
rationale.R1.3: Partially checked evidence-claim alignment but not all load-bearing claims.

rationale.RX.5: Traced major rewrites but not minor edits.
